title: tetraneuris glabriuscula
intro: Tetraneuris glabriuscula, also known as Rocky Mountain Bee Plant, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Tetraneuris glabriuscula include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tetraneuris glabriuscula can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
